flashcards.definition: Order of operations: Parentheses, Exponents, Multiplication/Division, Addition/Subtraction.
a^m · a^n = a^(m+n); when multiplying same bases, add exponents.
(a^m)^n = a^(mn); when raising a power to a power, multiply exponents.
a^(−n) = 1/a^n; a negative exponent means the reciprocal.
a^(m/n) = ⁿ√(a^m); the denominator is the root, the numerator is the power.
